commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Contributor proof and final CI/compatibility acceptance are needed before merge; there is no narrow code repair for ClawSweeper to apply.; Cleared: No supply-chain or secret-handling changes were found; the diff narrows local file URL parsing by delegating to Node. (sha=31af54488947611cb77a9de07d01a21c27f41c98)
commands.review_summary: The PR replaces manual `file:` URL pathname decoding in `resolveInputTarget` with Node `fileURLToPath`, strips query/hash before conversion, and adds regression tests for POSIX and Windows file URL parsing.¥n¥nReproducibility: yes. Current main's source path manually decodes and resolves file URL pathnames, and a focused Node check reproduces the bad coercion for non-local hosts and encoded separators while `fileURLToPath` rejects them.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor proof and final CI/compatibility acceptance are needed before merge; there is no narrow code repair for ClawSweeper to apply.

target.title: [codex] Fix file URL input parsing
target.body: ## Summary¥n- Parse `file:` URL inputs with Node's `fileURLToPath` instead of manually decoding `pathname` and passing it through `path.resolve`.¥n- Preserve existing query/hash stripping for file URLs before path conversion.¥n- Add regression coverage for encoded path separators, POSIX host rejection, and Windows drive / UNC conversion through Node's `{ windows: true }` behavior.¥n¥n## Why¥nThe previous manual parsing treated some invalid POSIX file URLs as valid local paths and produced wrong Windows paths. Examples:¥n- `file://not-localhost/tmp/summarize-proof.txt` was coerced to `/tmp/summarize-proof.txt` on POSIX instead of following Node's host validation.¥n- `file:///tmp/a%2Fb.txt` was decoded into `/tmp/a/b.txt` instead of rejecting encoded path separators.¥n- Windows drive and UNC file URLs need Node's platform-aware file URL conversion.¥n¥n## Review swarm¥n- Behavioral/intent reviewer: no findings.¥n- Security/privacy reviewer: no findings.¥n- Performance/reliability reviewer: found a POSIX-specific test assertion; addressed by asserting POSIX behavior through `resolveFileUrlPath(..., { windows: false })` while keeping Windows UNC coverage explicit.¥n- Contract/coverage reviewer: same portability finding; addressed.¥n¥n## Validation¥n- `pnpm exec vitest run tests/input.resolve-input-target.test.ts tests/content.asset.test.ts` (31 tests)¥n- `pnpm format:check`¥n- `pnpm typecheck`¥n- `pnpm lint`¥n
target.author: vincent-peng
